name: skillpack-registry
description: The open, cross-vendor registry of robot skills. Install as source — a policy reference + a typed contract + a capability manifest + a safety envelope + an eval. Composes LeRobot checkpoints; runs on any body in the driver registry.

skills.name: arm-reach
skills.title: Reach a target with the end-effector
skills.summary: Baseline P-controller reach, ramped under a per-tick velocity cap. Deterministic, ships in-repo.

skills.name: arm-reach-vla
skills.title: Reach a target with the end-effector (SmolVLA policy)
skills.summary: The same skill driven by a real SmolVLA (450M) — same contract, safety envelope, transport. Weights run in-browser on WebGPU.

skills.name: gripper-grasp
skills.title: Close the gripper to grasp
skills.summary: Approach + close to a grasp config, ramped under the velocity cap. Needs the gripper DoF (≥5), so it gates out 4-DoF arms.

skills.name: arm-pick-place
skills.title: Pick an object and place it on the target
skills.summary: Composes a real LeRobot ACT checkpoint via .select_action — the skill is the contract, the policy is a checkpoint reference.

skills.name: arm-stack
skills.title: Stack the blocks
skills.summary: Composes a LeRobot Diffusion Policy checkpoint. Architecture-agnostic: same adapter/contract/envelope as the ACT skill.

skills.name: mobile-goto
skills.title: Drive a mobile base to a waypoint
skills.summary: A VELOCITY-action-space skill for a mobile base — the contract spans morphologies. Runs on the TurtleBot; gates off the arms.

skills.name: quadruped-trot
skills.title: Trot gait for a 12-DoF quadruped
skills.summary: A CPG trot gait for a legged robot — the contract spans quadrupeds too. Diagonal leg pairs in phase; every joint command bounded by the envelope.
